title: Bind DaoTxState to exact RPL scope
description: Bind persisted DAO TX state to local origin IPv6, RPL instance, DODAG, and public key. Update all provision/open callers and tests; use a new format only.
acceptance_criteria: Scope mismatch fails closed and retained DAO bytes cannot be retransmitted under another origin or DODAG; all callers pass exact scope.
close_reason: Implemented DTX2 persistence binding key, local origin IPv6, RPL instance, and DODAG; updated all callers and added mismatch coverage. Verified full lichen-rpl std and focused lichen-node RPL tests.
